content.en:
Thirty Sevenfold Dao Realms, this number is definitely not much compared to other Innate Origin Domains, but it is a lot for the Infinite Domain.

"Wuji Heavenly Palace needs to send fifteen Sevenfold Dao Realm!"

The Taisu Palace Lord looked at the Six Cry Heavenly Venerable and ordered.

Liuqi Tianzun did not dare to refuse, this was also the original agreement.

Moreover, Taisu Palace has been staring at Wuji Heavenly Palace, and now it can't escape if it wants to.

And once the list is reported, if they dare to flee without permission, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance will not let them go.

"Yes!"

The Six Cry Heavenly Venerable responded.

Immediately, he said the names of the fifteen Sevenfold Dao Realms.

"I'm one!"

Ye Tiandao.

The Taisu Palace Master also said: "I also count as a quota!"

After that, the other forces also sent one or two Sevenfold Dao Realms, and finally managed to make up thirty places.

After the quota was determined, the Taisu Palace Master teleported to the Innate Origin Domain Alliance on the spot.

"Everyone, the quota has been uploaded, if anyone dares to escape from the Infinite Domain at this time, what will happen to you, you should know what will happen. The Taisu Palace Master reminded.

"I'll find out!"

Many Sevenfold Dao Realms hurriedly said.

After the meeting, the Seven Realms left.

......

"Ye Tian, I estimate that there will still be a few Sevenfold Dao Realm who will escape, I hope you can stop them in time!"

Taisu Palace Master said.

"No problem, I'll keep an eye on the side of the Wuji Heavenly Palace, and on the side of the other forces, it's up to you to keep an eye on the Taisu Palace Master!" Ye Tian said.

"Hmm!"

The Taisu Palace Master nodded.

Although it is unlikely that the other forces will escape, some of the Sevenfold Dao Realm are very dissatisfied with their selection, and they may flee!

Although escaping will be punished and wanted by the Innate Origin Alliance, it is not that there is no place to go, some very remote areas are hidden in them, and the Innate Origin Alliance will not necessarily spend a lot of money to search.

Infinite Heavenly Palace.

The Sixth Cry Heavenly Venerable and the Seventh Supreme Dao Realm returned, and they were all in a very bad mood.

"Six Cry Tianzun, are we really going to go?"

A sevenfold supreme realm asked.

"If you go, you are not sure to die, if you get a lot of credit, maybe you can hope to break through to the eightfold Dao realm!"

Then.

Another Sevenfold Realm Heavenly Venerable said: "Sixth Cry Heavenly Venerable, you don't need to go, you are letting us go, you are naturally not afraid!"

"Purple Winged Tianzun, do you mean you don't want to go?"

Six Cry Tianzun said coldly.

His strength is stronger than that of the Purple Winged Heavenly Venerable, and he is not afraid that the Purple Wing Heavenly Venerable will rebel against him.

Purple Winged Tianzun didn't speak, shook his hand and left.

After some time.

The Purple Winged Heavenly Venerable united the other two Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realm Heavenly Venerables, the Golden Toad Heavenly Venerable and the Realm Snake Heavenly Venerable, and they prepared to escape from the Infinite Domain.

The residence of the Purple Winged Heavenly Venerable.

The three Sevenfold Realm Heavenly Venerables had already packed their things.

"Ladies and gentlemen, the three of us have not been dragged down by the family, and we have been selected again, if we don't leave, we will almost definitely die!" said the Purple Winged Heavenly Venerable.

"We do have to leave, but where are we going?" asked the Realm Serpent Celestial Venerable.

Purple Winged Tianzun took out a map: "Those innate origin domains under the command of the Innate Origin Domain Alliance, we can't go, but here is a fragment of the Innate Origin Domain, which used to be an Innate Origin Domain, but it was later shattered, this area is very poor in energy, there is nothing good, and there is also a Ninefold Supreme Dao Realm in charge, and the Supreme Dao Void Demon rarely invades here." If we really can't escape the catastrophe, we can escape from this area into the Void Abyss. Being able to live is more important than anything else. In case we break through to the Eightfold Dao Realm in the future, and come back when the time comes, the Innate Origin Domain Alliance will also accept us. "

"Okay, here we go!"

Jin Toad Tianzun and Boundary Snake Tianzun nodded.

"I think one of the Sevenfold Supreme Dao Realms in the Winter Night Fortress can pay some price and let them help us teleport away. Without further ado, we have to go, Liuqi Tianzun will definitely not let us go, he is now in retreat and cultivating, and now is a good time to leave. "

Purple Winged Heavenly Venerable Dao.

Subsequently, the three of them Heavenly Venerable restrained their breath and left from the Infinite Heavenly Palace.

It was not possible to leave from the Innate Origin Domain Portal Passage, which had already been blocked by the Taisu Palace, so they went to a weak place in the Infinite Domain space as fast as they could.

With their strength, if they break the node in the weak place of the space, they can successfully leave the Infinite Domain.

Soon, they came to a node where space was weak.

Just as they were about to break through the place and leave, a figure appeared in front of them.

"Where are the three Heavenly Venerables going?"

The person who spoke was none other than Ye Tian.

"Ye Tian!"

Purple Winged Heavenly Venerable, their faces changed drastically.

"Ye Tian, we're just going out for a walk!" Purple Winged Tianzun said tremblingly.

"Hehe, you want to go, do you think I don't know?" Ye Tian didn't bother to talk nonsense, and with a wave of his hand, the sixth sequence of supreme dao rules turned into seals, directly sealing the three Tianzun, and they didn't even have the slightest strength to resist.

Then, he crossed the void step by step and rushed to the Infinite Heavenly Palace.

Rumble!

Ye Tian's breath was shocked, and he directly shook out the One Heavenly Venerable, and the Six Heavenly Venerables naturally came out.

"Six Cry Heavenly Venerables, these three Heavenly Venerables of your Wuji Heavenly Palace are going to leave the Wuji Domain, and they are caught by me, before the catastrophe comes, I will not lift the seal, these three Heavenly Venerables will be placed in your Wuji Heavenly Palace!"

After speaking, Ye Tian directly threw the three sealed Heavenly Venerables over.

"Yes!"

The Sixth Cry Tianzun did not dare to disobey Ye Tian's order.

Ye Tian's current cultivation has reached the middle stage of the Fifth Rank Dao Realm, and he has also comprehended the Sixth Sequence of Dao Rules, how terrifying his strength is, far beyond his imagination, how dare he oppose it!

After Ye Tian left, the Six Cry Heavenly Venerable looked at the Purple Winged Heavenly Venerable, a little annoyed.

These three guys wanted to escape without making a sound, and the three of them left, and the other Tianzun would definitely be forcibly made up by Taisu Palace, and maybe he would have to be forcibly pulled in to make up a place.

Therefore, he was very annoyed by the behavior of the Purple Winged Heavenly Venerable.

However, he was soon drawn to the seal.

"The Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules on this seal are much more powerful than the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules of the Wuji Heavenly Emperor!Ye Tian of Taisu Palace, such a demon, the Taibai Sword Lord is far inferior to his demons!"

However, he was also very resentful of Ye Tian in his heart.

Because after Ye Tian snatched the resources of the No. 1 Treasure Vault, he comprehended the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, maybe the treasures left by the Wuji Heavenly Emperor contained the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules, if he obtained it, he might also be able to comprehend the Sixth Sequence Supreme Dao Rules!

But when he thought of Ye Tian's strength and potential, he had no hope of revenge for the rest of his life!

"Ye Tian, I hope you die in the calamity!"

The Six Crying Heavenly Venerables could only curse so secretly.
